title: Log in and reach the home feed
description: A returning user can log in with valid credentials and land on the authenticated home feed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated home feed is displayed

title: Handle invalid login credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials on the login page sees a login error and does not access the authenticated area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the authenticated home feed is not displayed

title: Register a new account successfully
description: A prospective roommate can create a new account and receive confirmation that the account was created.

steps.description: Fill in the registration email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the registration password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an account creation confirmation is visible

title: Logged-in users can access the home feed
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can reach the main home feed after signing in and see the feed content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main home feed is displayed
Verify personalized home content is visible

title: Complete onboarding and reach discovery
description: A newly registered user can finish onboarding and then start swiping in discovery from the home flow.

title: Direct visits to the home feed require authentication
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot access the home feed and is prompted to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed
Verify access to the home feed is blocked

title: Complete the onboarding flow
description: A newly authenticated user can finish the multi-step onboarding process and see onboarding completion confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Continue to the next onboarding step
Verify onboarding completion confirmation is visible

title: Logged-in users see the home feed as the post-login landing page
description: This test verifies that a successful login takes the user to the main home feed instead of leaving them on an authentication page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main home feed is displayed
Verify the user is no longer on an authentication screen

title: Read and reply in a chat thread
description: An authenticated user can open a chat thread, read the conversation history, send a message, and see it added to the thread.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the message is added to the thread

title: Browse roommate candidates and like a profile
description: A user can view a candidate card in discovery, express interest, and move to the next candidate.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Swipe right on the current roommate profile card
Verify the next candidate card is displayed

title: View and update profile details
description: An authenticated user can edit profile information on the profile page and see the saved changes reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated profile data is displayed

title: Signed-in users can return to the home feed from another app area
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can navigate back to the main home feed from within the app and see the central landing content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main home feed is displayed
Verify the feed remains available after navigation

title: Send a message to a matched roommate
description: A matched member can open a conversation and send a message that appears in the chat thread.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Send a message with a unique test phrase
Verify the sent message appears in the conversation

title: Browse roommate candidates and pass on a profile
description: A user can view a candidate card in discovery, pass on it, and move to the next candidate.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Swipe left on the current roommate profile card
Verify the next candidate card is displayed

title: Open the chat inbox
description: A matched member can navigate to the chat inbox and see available conversations.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Upload and save a profile photo
description: An authenticated user can upload a profile photo on the profile page and see the new image displayed after saving.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new profile image is displayed

title: Home feed remains available after profile updates
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can update profile details and still return to the main home feed afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main home feed is displayed
Verify the updated profile state does not block access to the feed

title: Open the matches list
description: A matched member can navigate to the matches area and see matched roommates listed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: View and update profile settings
description: An authenticated member can open the profile page and save updated profile settings.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the profile changes are saved

title: Review match profile context
description: An authenticated user can open a match from the matches list and see the associated conversation context.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the associated conversation context is displayed

title: Create a new apartment listing
description: An authenticated member can open the new listing form, submit a listing, and see the listing appear.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the new apartment listing form
Fill in the required listing details with valid values
Verify the new listing is displayed

title: Enroll in MFA from profile settings
description: An authenticated member can start MFA enrollment from the profile page and see the enrollment flow appear.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the MFA enrollment flow is displayed

title: View apartment listings
description: An authenticated member can browse apartment listings and see available places content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Validate onboarding required fields before continuing
description: A user cannot advance through onboarding until required identity or preference fields are completed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Continue to the next onboarding step without completing required fields
Verify an onboarding validation error is visible

title: Recover from invalid login credentials
description: A user sees a login error when the entered credentials are invalid and remains blocked from access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email value
Fill in the password field with an invalid password value
Verify a login error is visible

title: Block direct access to admin for a regular member
description: A non-admin user is prevented from opening the moderation area directly and sees an access control message.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an access denied message is visible

title: Reject an invalid MFA code
description: A user with MFA enabled sees a validation error when the verification code is not a valid 6-digit code.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an MFA validation error is visible

title: Show an empty discovery state
description: A user sees an empty state when there are no more roommate candidates to browse.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Browse through available roommate cards until none remain
Verify an empty discovery state is visible
